profile.name: Lucas Picchi
profile.title: Tech Lead and Fullstack Developer
profile.bio: Specializing in industrial automation, IoT telemetry, and high-performance backend architecture.

projects.title: Industrial Telemetry Platform
projects.description: Real-time monitoring system for industrial compressors, featuring high-frequency data ingestion and live performance visualization.

projects.title: Automated QA Engine
projects.description: Distributed quality assurance framework for industrial production lines, automating testing flows to eliminate human error.

projects.title: Glass-Aero Portfolio
projects.description: A high-performance personal webpage featuring a custom WebGL landing and Xbox 360-inspired glassmorphic design system.

bullets: Architected the backend for a real-time telemetry platform for industrial compressor systems.
Leading and mentoring a technical team of three developers on software best practices and scalable architecture.
Optimizing industrial data ingestion pipelines using Redis and PostgreSQL for high-frequency monitoring.
Managing full-lifecycle deployments on VPS environments using Docker and Docker Compose.
Developed an automated QA system for production lines, reducing testing time and human error by 70%.
Designed and implemented high-performance backend services for industrial data processing.
Engineered responsive real-time dashboards to visualize complex industrial telemetry metrics.
Led technical selection processes to scale the engineering team with qualified talent.
Built and maintained scalable web applications using Node.js and React.
Improved database performance through advanced indexing and query optimization strategies.
Established the company's first CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and deployment.
